title: Deploy RoadMind to HuggingFace Spaces
description: Complete HuggingFace Space for RoadMind ready at /tmp/huggingface-roadmind/. Files: app.py (Gradio), requirements.txt, README.md. Need to: 1) Create HF Space 'blackroad/blackroad-roadmind', 2) git init + add remote, 3) push to HF, 4) Test live deployment, 5) Update product page with HF URL. Space URL: https://huggingface.co/spaces/blackroad/blackroad-roadmind
